title: vaccinium corymbosum f. glabrum
intro: Vaccinium corymbosum f. glabrum, also known as the glabrous or hairy blueberry, is a variation of the blueberry plant (Vaccinium corymbosum) that lacks hairs on its leaves. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of antioxidants and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Vaccinium corymbosum f. glabrum include anti-inflammatory and anti-aging effects, as well as the potential to improve cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Vaccinium corymbosum f. glabrum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
